features: Conversation continuity: graph_runner recovers session from PostgreSQL on RAM miss
Previous intent, entities, language, and narrative summary injected into Graph state
CAN node receives _previous_* fields for contextual multi-turn responses
fixes: Restored PostgreSQL conversation persistence (removed incorrectly in Nov 2025)
Fixed false comment claiming semantic_grounding_node auto-saves to conversations table

commits.message: feat(graph_runner): conversation continuity via PostgreSQL session recovery

validation: Non-blocking: PG recovery failure logs warning, does not break graph execution
Backward compatible: new state fields are additive (_previous_*)
Zero changes to Graph nodes — only richer input state
